summary: Navigation | Home page tiles for BTC Tools, Overrides, Blackout Override, Logger, Media Validation, Milestones, Audit & Logging, Partner Delivery, ESNI Management | Part I
gherkin:
When the user clicks on the BTC Tools tile on the Home page
And the user clicks on the Home on the side nav
And the user clicks on the Overrides tile on the Home page
And the user clicks on the Home on the side nav
And the user clicks on the Blackout Override tile on the Home page
And the user clicks on the Home on the side nav
And the user clicks on the Logger tile on the Home page
And the user clicks on the Home on the side nav
And the user clicks on the Media Validation tile on the Home page
And the user clicks on the Home on the side nav
And the user clicks on the Milestones tile on the Home page
And the user clicks on the Home on the side nav
And the user clicks on the Audit & Logging tile on the Home page
And the user clicks on the Home on the side nav
And the user clicks on Partner Stream Delivery tile on the Home page
And the user clicks on the Home on the side nav
And the user clicks on ESNI Management tile on the Home page
Then the user lands on the BTC Tools "Schedule" page
And the user should see a calendar icon with the format "YYYY-MM-DD" with Previous arrow and Next arrow
And the user should see "Pipeline Configs", "Pipeline Input Configs", "Multicast Mapping" tabs on top of the BTC Tools page
And the user should land on the Home page
And the user should land on the "Experience" page
And the user should see "Overrides", "Experience" tab, "+Create Override" button, "Search" box, and "View" button on right side of the page
And the user should see a table header contains "ID", "Okta ID", "Client Type", "Experience", "Features", and  "Action" in the table
And the user should land on the Home page
And the user should land on the "User Lookup" page
And the user should see the header of the page display "Blackout Override"
And the user should see "User Info Lookup" and "Overrides" tab on top of the page
And the user should see the the "User Info Lookup" text instructions:"User Lookup"Search for a user by email to view their information, existing overrides and recent Conviva sessions"
And the user should land on the Home page
And the user should land on the "Logger" page
And the user should see a calendar icon with the format "YYYY-MM-DD" with Previous arrow and Next arrow
And the user should land on the Home page
And the user should land on "Litmus" page
And the user should see the header of the page display "Media Validation" on top of the page
And the user should see a calendar icon with the format "YYYY-MM-DD" with Previous arrow and Next arrow
And the user should see a "Search For GamePK" box on the ride side of the Next arrow of the calendar
And the user should land on the Home page
And the user should land on the Milestones page
And the user should see the header of the page display "Milestones" on top of the page
And the user should see a calendar icon with the format "YYYY-MM-DD" with Previous arrow and Next arrow
And the user should land on the Home page
And the user should land on the "Schedule" page
And the user should see a calendar icon with the format "YYYY-MM-DD" with Previous arrow and Next arrow
And the user should see the header of the page "Audit & Logging"
And the user should see "Schedule", "Search by Game", "Search by Media", and "Search by User" tabs on top of the page
And the user should land on the Home page
And the user should land on the "Mapping" page
And the user should see the header of the page "Partner Delivery" on top of the page
And the the user should see "Mapping", and "Targets" tabs on top of the page right next to Partner Delivery
And the user should land on the Home page
And the user should land on the "Media ID" page
And the user should see "Policies" and "Audiences" tab on top of the page
And the user should see a calendar icon with the format "YYYY-MM-DD" with Previous arrow and Next arrow
And the user should see a "Search" box, and a "View" button on the right side of the page
